hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: The market sees a 46% shot at a $45K Bitcoin dump by year-end 2026, and that even split reflects genuine uncertainty about whether macro headwinds or institutional adoption wins over the next two years. A $45K floor assumes a 40%+ correction from here, which is brutal but not unprecedented for crypto, yet the market's just-flipped conviction (down 10 points in 24 hours) suggests weak hands are bailing rather than smart money repositioning.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin's $45K Floor Just Got 10 Points Cheaper. Time to Buy the Dip Bet?
daily_take.deck: BTC dip odds collapsed 10 points in 24 hours, dropping to 46%. The move reeks of leverage liquidation and retail panic, not fundamental repricing. Smart money sees a mispriced tail hedge here. If you think Bitcoin survives two more years without a 35% drawdown, the risk reward just flipped.
